Face Presence Analysis

Author

Jeffrey Girard

Published

June 12, 2026

Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(rstan)
library(brms)
library(easystats)
library(ggeffects)
library(gt)
info <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds")
part <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/partface_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info, by = join_by(subject, wave, month))
full <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/fullface_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info, by = join_by(subject, wave, month))

Partial Face Analyses

Partial Face Summary

df_part <- 
  part |> 
  filter(part_duration > 0) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, month),
    sum_part = sum(part_duration),
    pct_part = sum_part / first(session_duration)
  ) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = subject,
    window = row_number() - 1
  ) |> 
  complete(subject, window)
describe_distribution(df_part, select = "pct_part") |> print_md()
Variable Mean SD IQR Range Skewness Kurtosis n n_Missing
pct_part 0.32 0.13 0.18 (0.03, 0.65) 0.22 -0.28 135 41 
ggplot(df_part, aes(x = pct_part)) +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.025)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Video with a Partial Face", y = "Video Count")

Partial Face Null Model

part_null <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + (1 | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_null",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
variance_decomposition(part_null)
# Random Effect Variances and ICC

Conditioned on: all random effects

## Variance Ratio (comparable to ICC)
Ratio: 0.37  CI 95%: [0.09 0.57]

## Variances of Posterior Predicted Distribution
Conditioned on fixed effects: 0.01  CI 95%: [0.01 0.02]
Conditioned on rand. effects: 0.02  CI 95%: [0.01 0.02]

## Difference in Variances
Difference: 0.01  CI 95%: [0.00 0.01]

Partial Face Linear Time Model

part_linear <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_linear",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(part_linear, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(part_linear, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
(Intercept) -0.85 (-1.05, -0.67) 100% 1.001 1914
window 0.06 (-0.03, 0.14) 89.47% 1.000 2087
# Random Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.46 (0.31, 0.67) 100% 1.002 1592
SD (window: subject) 0.06 (4.05e-03, 0.17) 100% 1.001 1198
Cor (Intercept~window: subject) -0.65 (-0.99, 0.78) 84.53% 1.000 1431 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    part_linear, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = 0:3)
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0, 0.5)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 0:3,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Partial Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))
Ignoring unknown labels:
• fill : "NA"
• colour : "NA"
Ignoring unknown labels:
• fill : "NA"
• colour : "NA"
ggsave("ppl_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
Ignoring unknown labels:

Partial Face Monotonic Time Model

part_monotonic <- brm(
  formula = pct_part | mi() ~ 1 + mo(window) + (1 + mo(window) | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_part,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "part_monotonic",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(part_monotonic, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(part_monotonic, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
(Intercept) -0.84 (-1.02, -0.66) 100% 1.000 2068
mowindow 0.04 (-0.04, 0.13) 84.53% 1.001 2081
# Random Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.41 (0.27, 0.58) 100% 1.001 1638
SD (mowindow: subject) 0.03 (1.74e-03, 0.12) 100% 1.001 1676
Cor (Intercept~mowindow: subject) -9.31e-03 (-0.94, 0.94) 50.50% 1.002 1839 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    part_monotonic, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = 0:3)
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.25, 0.40)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 0:3,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Partial Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)

Full Face Analyses

Full Face Summaries

df_full <- 
  full |> 
  filter(full_duration > 0) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, month),
    sum_full = sum(full_duration),
    pct_full = sum_full / first(session_duration)
  ) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave) |> 
  mutate(
    .by = subject,
    window = row_number()
  ) |> 
  complete(subject, window)
describe_distribution(df_full, select = "pct_full") |> print_md()
Variable Mean SD IQR Range Skewness Kurtosis n n_Missing
pct_full 0.04 0.03 0.04 (1.36e-03, 0.17) 1.30 1.99 136 40 
ggplot(df_full, aes(x = pct_full)) +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.025)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face", y = "Video Count")

Full Face Null Model

full_null <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + (1 | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  file = "full_null",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
variance_decomposition(full_null)
# Random Effect Variances and ICC

Conditioned on: all random effects

## Variance Ratio (comparable to ICC)
Ratio: 0.19  CI 95%: [-0.35 0.50]

## Variances of Posterior Predicted Distribution
Conditioned on fixed effects: 0.00  CI 95%: [0.00 0.00]
Conditioned on rand. effects: 0.00  CI 95%: [0.00 0.00]

## Difference in Variances
Difference: 0.00  CI 95%: [-0.00 0.00]

Full Face Linear Time Model

full_linear <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "full_linear",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(full_linear, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(full_linear, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
(Intercept) -3.45 (-3.74, -3.16) 100% 1.001 1835
window 0.11 (1.14e-03, 0.21) 97.57% 1.001 1930
# Random Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.38 (0.06, 0.80) 100% 1.008 532
SD (window: subject) 0.06 (3.18e-03, 0.21) 100% 1.007 1235
Cor (Intercept~window: subject) -0.67 (-0.99, 0.82) 79.93% 1.001 1392 
plot(
  conditional_effects(
    full_linear, 
    effects = "window", 
    int_conditions = list(window = 0:3)
  ), 
  plot = FALSE
)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0, 0.06)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 0:3,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))

Full Face Monotonic Time Model

full_monotonic <- brm(
  formula = pct_full | mi() ~ 1 + mo(window) + (1 + mo(window) | subject),
  family = Beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log"),
  data = df_full,
  prior = set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "full_monotonic",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
pp_check(full_monotonic, ndraws = 50)
model_parameters(full_monotonic, effects = "all") |> print_md()
# Fixed Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
(Intercept) -3.33 (-3.55, -3.13) 100% 1.000 2105
mowindow 0.10 (-0.01, 0.20) 95.73% 1.003 2273
# Random Effects
Parameter Median 95% CI pd Rhat ESS (tail)
SD (Intercept: subject) 0.31 (0.07, 0.51) 100% 1.008 561
SD (mowindow: subject) 0.04 (1.79e-03, 0.15) 100% 1.003 1315
Cor (Intercept~mowindow: subject) -0.30 (-0.97, 0.92) 65.73% 1.001 2181 
plot(conditional_effects(full_monotonic, effects = "window"), plot = FALSE)[[1]] +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent,
    limits = c(0.025, 0.060)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 0:3,
    labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percent of Video Frames with a Full Face") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)

Descriptive Tables

df_part |>
  drop_na() |>
  summarize(
      .by = wave,
      n = n(),
      Mean = mean(pct_part, na.rm = TRUE),
      SD = sd(pct_part, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(pct_part, na.rm = TRUE),
      MAD = mad(pct_part, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  rename(Wave = wave) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Partial Faces") |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c("Mean", "SD", "Median", "MAD"))
Partial Faces
Wave n Mean SD Median MAD
6 43 30.57% 14.34% 28.28% 16.05%
9 41 32.13% 13.90% 29.79% 16.09%
12 26 33.37% 12.62% 32.81% 10.50%
15 25 31.96% 10.71% 32.35% 8.03% 
df_full |>
  drop_na() |>
  summarize(
      .by = wave,
      n = n(),
      Mean = mean(pct_full, na.rm = TRUE),
      SD = sd(pct_full, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(pct_full, na.rm = TRUE),
      MAD = mad(pct_full, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  rename(Wave = wave) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Full Faces") |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c("Mean", "SD", "Median", "MAD"))
Full Faces
Wave n Mean SD Median MAD
6 44 3.39% 2.94% 2.44% 2.07%
9 41 3.83% 2.83% 3.04% 1.63%
12 26 5.45% 3.84% 4.46% 3.41%
15 25 3.86% 2.17% 3.26% 2.59%

Results Table

models <- list(
  "Partial" = part_linear,
  "Full" = full_linear
)

res <- 
  map(
    models,
    \(x) { 
      describe_posterior(x, parameters = "window") |> 
      as_tibble() |> 
      transmute(
        Est. = Median,
        CL = CI_low,
        CU = CI_high,
        OR = exp(Est.),
        OR_CL = exp(CL),
        OR_CU = exp(CU),
        pval = 2 * (1 - pd)
      )
    }
  ) |> 
  list_rbind(names_to = "Outcome")

gt_table <- 
  gt(res) |> 
  fmt_number(
    columns = Est.:OR_CU, 
    decimals = 2
  ) |> 
  fmt(
    columns = pval,
    fns = \(x) {
      char_x <- sprintf("%.3f", x)
      char_x <- sub("^0\\.", ".", char_x)
      ifelse(x < 0.001, "<.001", char_x)
    }
  ) |> 
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(Est., CL, CU),
    pattern = "{1} ({2}, {3})"
  ) |> 
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(OR, OR_CL, OR_CU),
    pattern = "{1} ({2}, {3})"
  ) |> 
  cols_label(
    Est. = "Logit Scale",
    OR = "Odds Ratio",
    pval = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(Est., OR)
  )

gt_table
Outcome Logit Scale Odds Ratio p-value
Partial 0.06 (−0.03, 0.14) 1.06 (0.97, 1.15) .211
Full 0.11 (0.00, 0.21) 1.11 (1.00, 1.24) .049
